name: Trial of the Princesses
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>王</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>おう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>女</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>じょ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>の<ruby lang="jp"><rb>試</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>し</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>練</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>れん</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
desc: Equip only to "White Magician Pikeru" or "Ebon Magician Curran"; it gains 800 ATK. During a turn that the equipped monster destroyed a Level 5 or higher monster by battle, you can Tribute the equipped monster and this card to Special Summon from your hand or Deck: 1 "Princess Pikeru" if you Tributed "White Magician Pikeru", or 1 "Princess Curran" if you Tributed "Ebon Magician Curran".
eff: Equip only to "White Magician Pikeru" or "Ebon Magician Curran"; it gains 800 ATK. During a turn that the equipped monster destroyed a Level 5 or higher monster by battle, you can Tribute the equipped monster and this card to Special Summon from your hand or Deck: 1 "Princess Pikeru" if you Tributed "White Magician Pikeru", or 1 "Princess Curran" if you Tributed "Ebon Magician Curran".

action: Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
misc: Equips only to a specific target
